subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! All divine Books and Scriptures have guided the peoples of the earth unto this hallowed and blessed Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله جمیع کتب و صحف الهی عباد ارض را باین یوم مقدس مبارک
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment, @high station of the true believer, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
